libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native runtime execution, configure the generated test build to pass these runtime system properties to `nativeTest`: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. No external service or Docker image is needed; meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server on localhost.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The unsafe-access properties are specific to the JDK 25 plus Netty 4.2.x native-image runtime behavior; local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative.
`OAuth2WebClient` exists in the artifact but relies on optional Vert.x auth OAuth2 classes; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless the test intentionally adds that dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 uses Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.2.Final; native-image runtime tests on JDK 25 need Netty unsafe access properties to avoid connection/allocator failures.
